smoke.label: Smoke (≤15 tests, <60 s SLA)
smoke.description: Curated critical-path smoke suite. 5 paths: daemon worktree start, dashboard main pages, iw next-id, item queue, /healthz. CR-00052.

properties.label: Property Tests (Hypothesis, ci profile)
properties.description: Hypothesis state-machine + @given properties on work-item / batch / fix-cycle / doc-diff / id-allocation. ci profile (20 examples, ~1.5 s). CR-00060.

properties-deep.label: Property Tests (Hypothesis, deep profile)
properties-deep.description: Hypothesis deep profile — more examples, longer deadlines. ~minutes. CR-00060.

quarantine.label: Quarantine / Flaky (with reruns)
quarantine.description: Run tests marked @pytest.mark.quarantine with rerunfailures. Informational — does NOT block. CR-00061.

flake-detect.label: Flake Detection (3-run aggregator)
flake-detect.description: Run the full suite 3× and aggregate flakes. ~3× wall-clock of test-integration. CR-00061.

cli-contract.label: iw CLI Contract
cli-contract.description: Per-command exit-code / stdout / DB-effect tests for the 6 priority iw commands + bidirectional spec-conformance check. CR-00073.

isolation.label: Cross-Project Isolation Matrix
isolation.description: Dual-project matrix proving no leakage across routes / iw commands / per-worktree DB boundary. CR-00074.

security-module.label: Security Test Module
security-module.description: Live-DB write guard + authz negative paths + doc-render SSRF / path-traversal + agent-context env handling. CR-00075.

data-layer.label: Data Layer (FTS + migration round-trip + DB-identity)
data-layer.description: FTS-trigger invariants + migration revision-skew regression (pins I-00075/76) + DB-identity. CR-00076.

route-sweep.label: Dashboard Route Sweep (no-5xx)
route-sweep.description: Every dashboard GET/HEAD route asserted < 500 against a seeded TestClient. CR-00072.

contract-fuzz.label: Schemathesis JSON API Fuzz
contract-fuzz.description: schemathesis property-fuzz of JSON endpoints against OpenAPI schema. Nightly-class — non-blocking. CR-00072.

test-assertions.label: Assertion Scanner
test-assertions.description: AST scanner for no-assert / tautology / mock-only / broad pytest.raises. Frozen baseline at tests/assertion_free_baseline.txt. CR-00046.

e2e-smoke.label: E2E Browser Smoke (2 journeys, blocking)
e2e-smoke.description: Subset of the E2E browser-journey matrix — home-navigation + queue-to-merge. Blocking on PR. F-00088.

e2e.label: E2E Browser Full (6 journeys)
e2e.description: Full 6-journey browser-journey matrix — home, queue→merge, code-QA SSE, docs export, jobs filters, htmx fragments. ~minutes. F-00088.

perf.label: Performance Budgets (all)
perf.description: pytest-benchmark assertions on daemon poll-loop, RAG query, dashboard routes. Regression alerts at +25% vs baselines. CR-00083.

perf-daemon.label: Performance — Daemon Poll Loop
perf-daemon.description: One Daemon._poll_cycle() iteration vs seeded testcontainer DB. CR-00083.

perf-rag.label: Performance — RAG Query
perf-rag.description: One CodeQA.answer_stream call vs in-memory LanceDB + stub embedding. CR-00083.

perf-routes.label: Performance — Dashboard Routes
perf-routes.description: p50 latency across home + queue + batches + jobs + code routes. CR-00083.

daemon-chaos-smoke.label: Daemon Chaos Smoke (2 scenarios)
daemon-chaos-smoke.description: Deterministic chaos: worktree-setup-mid-fail + fix-cycle-cap. PR-blocking. F-00089.

daemon-chaos-full.label: Daemon Chaos Full (~minutes, 5-scenario matrix)
daemon-chaos-full.description: Full chaos matrix: worktree-setup-mid-fail, fix-cycle-cap, agent-stall, squash-merge-conflict, migration-rebase-fail. ~minutes. Nightly-class. F-00089.

visual-regression.label: Visual Regression (HTML + PDF baselines)
visual-regression.description: pixelmatch vs committed baselines — 4 PDFs + 4 HTML pages. Nightly + path-filtered PR. CR-00082.

typecheck.label: Type Check (Mypy)
typecheck.description: Strict static type checking on orch/ and dashboard/

check-column-docs.label: DB Column Doc Scanner
check-column-docs.description: Walks Base.registry.mappers and flags Column declarations lacking doc=. Becomes blocking after CR-00092 baseline scrub. CR-00085.

security-secrets.label: Secret Scan (gitleaks)
security-secrets.description: gitleaks against working tree + history. Blocking. CR-00050.

security-sast.label: SAST (Semgrep)
security-sast.description: Semgrep with p/python + p/owasp-top-ten + p/security-audit rulesets. Blocking. CR-00050 + CR-00051.

security-deps.label: Dependency Audit (bandit + pip-audit)
security-deps.description: bandit (Python-specific SAST) + pip-audit (CVE lookup against PyPI advisory DB).

diff-coverage.label: Diff Coverage (≥90% on PR-changed lines)
diff-coverage.description: diff-cover vs origin/main. Builds combined unit+integration coverage internally. Blocking on PR. CR-00047.

mutation-check.label: Mutation Check (changed files)
mutation-check.description: mutmut on changed-files only, cache-warmed from main. On-demand today (CR-00080 viability guard fired M=0%, K=55).

mutation-audit.label: Mutation Audit (~1h, full orch/)
mutation-audit.description: Full mutmut audit over all of orch/. ~1h wall-clock. Intended for nightly CI; ad-hoc launch only when investigating mutation score. CR-00059 + CR-00080.

dead-code.label: Dead Code (vulture)
dead-code.description: vulture with min_confidence=70 over orch + dashboard + executor + scripts. Warn-only today. CR-00048.

dep-check.label: Dependency Hygiene (deptry)
dep-check.description: deptry — unused, missing, transitive, misplaced deps. Warn-only today. CR-00048.

_auto_amend_scope_example._note: Uncomment by renaming to 'auto_amend_scope'. When present, the daemon auto-amends scope violations that all match auto_allow_patterns and stay within max_paths. Default (key absent) keeps today's manual amend flow.
